_doc: Neredeydi remote version gate. Edit + push to control updates with NO app rebuild. 'minVersion': installed BELOW this gets a blocking 'update required' screen (hard force). 'latestVersion': installed below this (but at/above min) gets a dismissible soft nudge. Default below is soft-only (minVersion 1.0.0 blocks nobody). To force everyone onto a build, raise minVersion to that version. Fail-open: if this file is unreachable the app does nothing.
